nodes.label: Project Looking Glass

nodes.label: Operation Laser Strike (Peru 1997)
nodes.summary: 1997 US anti-narco operation in Peru; ground-based radar systems tracking drug-running planes. Lance Corporal Jonathan Wagant was sent to investigate what was presented as a downed friendly plane — encountered a crashed UAP.

sources.timestamp_end: US counter-narcotics operation in Peru where Wagant encountered UAP

nodes.label: Peru 1997 UFO Crash (Wagant)
nodes.summary: 1997 Peru crash witnessed by Jonathan Wagant (USMC Lance Corporal) under Operation Laser Strike. Egg-shaped/teardrop craft embedded in cliff face, hatch open, four-fingered arm hanging out, purplish-green liquid dripping, being telepathically asking for help.

sources.timestamp_end: Egg-shaped craft embedded in cliff face with alien arm visible

nodes.label: Common thread across three independent crash-retrieval witnesses: intercepted by 8-12 operators in a
nodes.summary: Common thread across three independent crash-retrieval witnesses: intercepted by 8-12 operators in all black with no insignia / name tags, held at gunpoint, and dosed with what they were told were 'anthrax vaccine boosters.'

sources.quote: They're immediately intercepted by between 8 and 12 operators in all black, no insignia, no name tags, held at gunpoint. All three of these men directly after their encounters were given what they were told were anthrax vaccine boosters.
